message:
test(core): session-type mode transition E2E with JSONL logging (bd-3rrzt.4)

Add 19 integration/E2E tests for typestate terminal mode transitions:
- All forward transitions (Cooked→Raw→Alt→Mouse→Paste→Focus)
- All backward transitions (disable, exit, teardown)
- Teardown from every reachable composite state → Cooked
- Builder pattern flag equivalence with typestate
- Re-entry after teardown starts from clean state
- Full lifecycle with structured JSONL logging
- Composite enable/disable round-trips
- Debug format verification for all states
- Builder enforcement (4 should_panic tests)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
